name: project-state
description: Twenty-three skills that turn any multi-stakeholder project into a system where routine reporting is a byproduct of normal work. Covers the full project lifecycle: scaffolding, phase gates, milestones, risks, decisions, status reports, funder reporting, review meetings, IP tracking, external comms, blog publishing, website publishing, and archival. Pack-driven for any funding model — consortium grants, client engagements, agile teams, open-source communities.
